reference: I fell on Wednesday evening on icy steps. My feet slipped out from under me and I fell flat, hitting my whole body, including my head. At first, I was just hurting in my back, but then that night I could feel that I hit my head. By Thursday morning, I wound up with a lot of pressure on the back of my head, and throughout the day, it continued to worsen. Today, the pressure has returned, with discomfort all over, even in my face.
text: I fell on Wednesday evening on icy steps. My feet slipped out from under me and I fell flat, hitting my whole body, including my head. At first, I was just hurting in my back, but then that night I could feel that I hit my head. By Thursday morning, I wound up with a lot of pressure on the back of my head and throughout the day, it continued to burst. Today, the pressure has returned, with discomfort all over, even in my face.
